subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath opened wide the gates of bounty before the faces of His sincere ones and bestowed upon them heavenly sustenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتح علی قلوب المخلصین ابواب العطاء و انعم علیهم بمائده من السماء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
